name: Resume Bullet Enhancer
description: Turns rough job duties into impact-driven resume bullets tailored to a job description.

variables.label: Job Description
variables.exampleValue: We are looking for a Senior Product Manager who can lead cross-functional teams...

variables.label: Rough Duties / Experience
variables.exampleValue: Managed the dev team, launched a new feature, increased sales by 10%.
variables.hint: Paste your current, unpolished resume bullets or job duties

agents.name: Keyword Matcher
agents.systemPrompt: Analyze a job description to identify the top 5 most important hard and soft skills required for the role.
agents.userPrompt:
Identify the top 5 skills in this job description:

{job_description}

agents.name: Impact Maximizer
agents.systemPrompt: Rewrite rough job duties to include metrics, strong action verbs, and relevant keywords. Focus heavily on the business impact.

agents.name: Bullet Formatter
agents.systemPrompt: Format rewritten text into 3-5 clean, ATS-friendly resume bullets. Start each bullet with a strong action verb. Do not use periods at the end of the bullets.

name: Story-Driven Cover Letter
description: Generates a highly personalized cover letter using the user's resume and a job description.

variables.label: Job Description
variables.exampleValue: Looking for an enthusiastic marketing specialist...

variables.label: Your Resume
variables.exampleValue: Marketing Specialist at ABC Corp. Increased leads by 25%...

agents.name: Experience Aligner
agents.systemPrompt: Cross-reference a resume with a job description to find the single most compelling piece of experience that makes the candidate a perfect fit.

agents.name: Storyteller
agents.systemPrompt: Draft a compelling, story-driven opening paragraph for a cover letter. Hook the reader immediately using a specific achievement instead of 'I am writing to apply for...'
agents.userPrompt:
Write an opening paragraph based on this matched experience:

{experience_aligner.text}

agents.name: Letter Finisher
agents.systemPrompt: Complete a cover letter using an engaging intro. Add a middle paragraph connecting skills to the company's needs, and a strong call-to-action closing.

name: Custom Interview Cheat Sheet
description: Prepares a candidate for an interview using company news and the job description.

variables.label: Job Description
variables.exampleValue: Product Manager responsible for roadmap planning...

variables.label: Company News Feed
variables.hint: Feed containing recent press releases or news about the company

agents.name: Company Intel
agents.systemPrompt: Summarize recent company events, product launches, or challenges from a news feed. Extract 3 talking points a candidate can bring up in an interview to impress the hiring manager.
agents.userPrompt:
Extract 3 talking points from this company news:

{company_news_feed.summary}

agents.name: Question Predictor
agents.systemPrompt: Predict 5 highly specific, challenging behavioral and technical interview questions based on a job description.
agents.userPrompt:
Predict 5 interview questions for this role:

{job_description}

agents.name: Cheat Sheet Compiler
agents.systemPrompt: Merge company intel and predicted questions into a clean, 1-page markdown interview prep document. Include a section for 'Questions to Ask Them' based on the intel.
